privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real R built-in 'airquality' dataset (New York measurements from 1973). The target files and scripts match the expected paths defined in the export scripts. Running a GAM on the na.omit cleaned dataset using mgcv's gam(Ozone ~ s(Solar.R) + s(Wind) + s(Temp)) yields an AIC of approximately 962.6, which is correctly lower than the linear model's AIC of 998.7. The predicted ozone for a High Risk Day (Solar.R=200, Wind=5, Temp=90) is approximately 96.32 ppb.
